full_name: Rory Brown - Financial Planning for Expats in SG
last_name: Brown - Financial Planning for Expats in SG
headline: Partner and Financial Planner at Ascenta Wealth 🤝 | Providing financial advice to expatriates in Singapore 🇸🇬 |  5 out of 5 ⭐️ on Google

positionList.title: Branch Manager, Bank of Scotland (BOS)/Halifax UK
positionList.description:
- Significant focus on promoting the brand and the profile of the branch in the local community in order to attract and acquire quality new customers in line with agreed business plans

- Successfully led and managed the integration of 2 Branches and 23 colleagues into a single unit following the merger of BOS/Halifax. Strong change and people management skills were required to complete the integration within the required timelines whilst continuing to provide a fully functioning Branch service. A successful integration led to significant business cost savings, increased colleague morale and a significant uplift in sales through increased customer product offerings.

- Responsible for providing regular coaching and other one-to-one support to colleagues to maximise their development and quickly identify and manage under performance

- Youngest Branch Manager in the Region's history being appointed at 22

positionList.title: National Bancassurance and Savings Sales Manager
positionList.description:
- Responsible for the establishment and roll out of a Bancassurance Sales Model initially through the Branch Network with a clear strategy to extend the model through additional channels to extend distribution

- From a starting point of 3 Financial Planners (FP's) increased this to 12 over an 18 month period covering all 44 Branches as well as developing the channel plan to drive sales and lead generation through the telephony channel, online and through external worksite and partnership visits.

- Portfolio extended in August 2009 to include national ownership for the Retail Savings Book with a clear focus on both acquisition of funds and retention of existing deposits.

- Designed the Management Information (MI) required to allow for active sales management and clear visibility of performance

positionList.title: Regional Mortgage Manager
positionList.description:
- Established a multi channel Mortgage Sales Force (MSF) involving the recruitment and training of 63 Mortgage Advisors across 44 Branches and a telephone sales team

- From a zero base, established the Halifax brand in the Retail Mortgage Market with a constant focus on increasing sales through partnerships, worksite schemes and a mobile underwriting offering.

- Responsible for the sales and capability development of the MSF through an ongoing programme of training, workshops, sales observations and regulatory training.

- Designed and implemented the necessary regulatory framework to evidence compliance to the Financial Regulator – this was adopted by the Retail Division overall as the template to monitor the sales quality and compliance of all core Retail products.

- Designed the process and worked with the E-commerce team to implement an online mortgage application form which delivered a significant increase in sales in 2008.

positionList.title: Senior Halifax Branch Design Manager
positionList.description:
- Senior Manager with overall responsibility for the delivery and agreement off sign off of all Branch related processes and procedures for Halifax as part of the start up operation in Ireland covering all 44 Branches

- Designed all the Sales Processes for the core Halifax products and working with our training team, translated these into the material for all the new colleagues joining the Bank

- Responsible for the weekly collation of a progress summary submitted to both  BOSI and HBOS Senior Management to clearly and concisely show the progress of the project against plan, budget and timelines.

- A hugely varied and challenging role that required excellent communication skills, highly efficient stakeholder management, the ability to consistently adapt to change and tight deadlines whilst managing to remain focussed on the delivery of a hugely strategic project for the Bank. A hugely satisfying role that culminated in the successful  in January 2006 in opening of the first Retail Bank in Ireland in over 100 years

positionList.title: Retirement Specialist
positionList.description:
- Partner with financial advisors and help them create predictable income streams for their clients - safe in the knowledge this income can never go down and never run out.

- Allow advsiors to remove the possibility of ever having another income reduction discussion with their clients.

- Introduce the concept of guarantees and how firms can transfer market and investment risk away from themselves

- Raise awareness of AXA's involvement in the guaranteed income market

- Establish ALI as the easiest and most efficient firm in the market to do business with

positionList.title: Head of Sales Desk
positionList.description:
- Manage a team of Internal Wholesalers selling Variable Annuity products (VA) through third party distribution channels in the UK and French Markets.

- From launch in 2009, have grown the team from 2 Wholesalers to 12 Wholesalers, delivering sales in excess of €100 million in 2011.

- Part of AXA’s first ever transversal initiative with regards to the sales of financial products, with full responsibility for establishing the cultures, sales practices and business approach of the Sales Desk.

- Ownership of the overall Sales Process across both the UK and French markets with a particular focus on combining the use of face to face, telephone and online meetings.

- Business owner for the introduction of Salesforce.com into AGD with ownership from the beginning of the project up to its implementation across the UK, French and Spanish Markets.

- Through partnership with our Online Team, increased web usage by 300% in a 6 month period and delivered over €30 million of sales through the online channel in 2011.

- Delivered a Team Engagement score of 94% in the 2011 Staff Survey, compared to a company average of 80% and a high performing team average of 86%.

positionList.title: Partner
positionList.description:
Ascenta Wealth was founded to provide personalised financial advice that works for you, not the big financial institutions.

At Ascenta, we don’t sell financial products. 

We propose financial options with a fresh approach called Lifestyle Financial Planning and the focus at Ascenta is very much on you, not your money.

In a market and industry that can often be complex and opaque, you’ll find at Ascenta that we’re committed to simplicity, transparency and a focus on long term collaboration with each and every one of our clients.

As a Partner at Ascenta Wealth, I specialise in working with Senior Executives creating personalised solutions which are 100% tailored to their individual needs. This will be unique to each and every client and will normally include Wealth Creation, Tax Planning, Estate Planning and Wealth Preservation strategies, all within a comprehensive Financial Plan.

I hold a number of specialist UK Qualifications with regards to Pension Transfers and Advice, along with the UK’s highest qualification in Advanced Financial Planning, which I achieved in 2020.

Please feel free to contact me on 8124 7339 or rory@ascentawealth.com if you would like an initial discussion.

Ascenta Wealth is part of Farringdon Asset Management Pte Ltd (CMS License No:100560)
